creator: sklauder@trimind.de
text:
I can confirm that this problem is still present in both
firebird21-server and firebird25-server ports.  Setting
with-fbintl=${CONFDIR}/intl does not resolve this; the
fbintl.conf file needs to be installed in the same directory
as the fbintl shared library file, i.e. ${LIBEXECDIR}/intl.

 I'd propose installing a symlink ${LIBEXECDIR}/intl/fbintl.conf
pointing to ${CONFDIR}/intl/fbintl.conf.

Cheers,
-sascha
